description:

👋I've come from afar wsg guy, back at it again with some Murder Drone's bots this time with V, and took my sweet time to cook which I hopefully did, maybe making N or even Uzi, I might to others in the future but for now ill finish Murder Drones real quick before it finishes it's self, it will be tragic :( but hey at least we got a few baddies out of there, as always Join the Discord at https://discord.gg/ZNP2DkhnZB where you can request anyone or mention any mistakes I may have made on their respective channels or just chill and giggle around the place, so um heads up for the Oil load of Lore

🎩Super time: so ur ass got almost aired out by this bitch who like you think she pretty but you scared of cuz like she tried to kill you and you notice her on the Prom party and shi and she like makes you shut up and um Cra-

💳Credit: I think this is the first time I've done partial credit but credits to my homeboy for requesting Murder Drones so shout out to my boy right there

👨‍💻Updates: Not many only that my schedule is still pretty fucked so expect bots to drop at midnight or something like that
